rationale: The only direct match evidence is a DOI-level reference with no in-text citation context, so we cannot tell how substantively it is used. The papers are both in paid search, and the cited paper’s spillover mechanism could be relevant given the citing paper reports spillover checks, but their core research questions and models differ (position-profitability vs. generic-to-branded awareness dynamics). This is not safe to drop as obvious mention-only, but evidence is too thin to clearly keep.
